[a framework for training transdisciplinary scholars in cancer prevention and control.](https://www.linkedin.com/redir/redirect?url=http%3A%2F%2Fwww%2Encbi%2Enlm%2Enih%2Egov%2Fpubmed%2F25510368%3Freport%3Dxml%26format%3Dtext&urlhash=DcWq&trk=public_profile_publication-title "a framework for training transdisciplinary scholars in cancer prevention and control.")journal of cancer education : the official journal of the american association for cancer education December 16, 2014traditionally, postdoctoral training programs largely have focused efforts within a single discipline or closely related fields. yet, addressing the complex questions around cancer prevention and control increasingly requires the ability to work and communicate across disciplines in order to gain a perspective that encompasses the multilevel and multifaceted issues involved with this public health issue.
